title: Rental affordability schemes
description: Find out about the national rental affordability scheme and investing in affordable rental housing.
keywords: Rental affordability, affordable housing, affordability offset, affordability scheme, NRAS

child_links.title: Investing in affordable rental housing
child_links.description: If you invest in affordable rental housing, you need to declare rental income and you may be able to claim deductions.
